title: UnDercontrol YAML Resource Envelope
description: Generic envelope for YAML resource files. All non-markdown resources use this k8s-like structure: apiVersion + kind + metadata + spec. This is the single source of truth for the envelope format used by CLI 'ud apply -f' and future sync clients.

apiVersion.description: API version. Always 'ud/v1' for current resources.

kind.description: Resource kind. Determines which spec schema to use. Tasks and Notes use .md format instead.

spec.description: Resource-specific fields. Schema varies by kind — see {kind}.v1.schema.json.

id.description: Resource UUID or prefix. Present = update existing, absent = create new. Prefix is resolved to full UUID by the CLI.

money.description: Money value object. Amount is in smallest currency unit (e.g., cents for USD). CLI accepts decimal notation (e.g., 42.50) and converts to cents internally.

amount.description: Decimal amount in major currency units (e.g., 42.50 for $42.50). CLI converts to cents for the API.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code. Defaults to user's default currency if omitted.

create_vs_update.description:
Declarative semantics (kubectl-style):
- No 'id' in metadata → CREATE new resource
- 'id' present → UPDATE existing resource (id can be full UUID or prefix)

Apply is idempotent: re-applying the same file with an id produces the same result.

multi_document.description:
YAML files support multi-document format with '---' separators. Each document is an independent resource:

---
apiVersion: ud/v1
kind: Account
spec:
  name: Checking
---
apiVersion: ud/v1
kind: Account
spec:
  name: Savings

Resources are applied in order. Errors on one document do not stop processing of subsequent documents.

file_format.description:
YAML resource files (.yaml or .yml) use the k8s-like envelope:

apiVersion: ud/v1
kind: Board
metadata:
  id: abc123
  tags: [work]
spec:
  name: Sprint Board
  ...

Markdown files (.md) continue to use frontmatter format for Tasks and Notes. When reading from stdin (-f -), format is auto-detected: content starting with 'apiVersion:' is parsed as YAML, otherwise as markdown.
